title: Vertical lines, not straight, not touching

rule.instruction: Vertical lines, not straight, not touching, covering the wall evenly.

restrictions: Faithful execution — the canonical LeWitt 'not straight' piece, exactly what the jitter tool was built for. A single field of VERTICAL, NOT-STRAIGHT lines (ruledLines vertical + jitter), evenly spaced across the whole 300x300mm wall, NOT TOUCHING (spacing kept >= ~3x the wave amplitude so adjacent lines never cross). Monochrome black on white. The 16 executions span a range: fine + faintly-wavy -> wide + strongly-flowing, varying spacing (density), jitter (waviness) and seed. Per learnings: includes the natural-hand zone (jitter ~3-6) and tests the wide-spaced flowing end, where high waviness should read as elegant flow rather than 'broken' because the lines stay separated.
